CVE-2018-1285.title: Apache log4net versions before 2.0.10 do not disable XML external ...
CVE-2018-1285.summary: Apache log4net versions before 2.0.10 do not disable XML external entities when parsing log4net configuration files. This allows for XXE-based attacks in applications that accept attacker-controlled log4net configuration files.

CVE-2018-1285.summary: Apache log4net versions before 2.0.10 do not disable XML external entities when parsing log4net configuration files. This allows for XXE-based attacks in applications that accept attacker-controlled log4net configuration files.
